subject: Houndoom, a dark-type canine Pokemon with curved horns, bony ring markings on its legs, and a spiked tail, lunging forward in an aggressive stance
description: A dark, quadrupedal canine creature crouches in a forward-lunging stance against a moody indigo and teal atmospheric background. The creature has a sleek dark body with prominent curved horns emerging from its head, bony ring-like markings encircling its legs, and a long tail ending in a bony spike. Its posture conveys aggression and readiness to strike. The background is minimal — soft gradients of dark blue and teal with faint circular energy emanations suggest a shadowy environment.
foreground: dark canine creature in low crouch, spiked tail raised, horned head forward
background: atmospheric dark gradient with teal and indigo tones, faint circular energy patterns
